actions.intent: Open the left side of the hero route and break the first crate without adding dock residue.
Spend a controlled dock cost to open both side access points around the hero puppy.
Finish the hero rescue with the lower route clear.
Begin the secondary route while clearing dock pressure back down.
Open the right side of the secondary puppy route.
Complete the secondary rescue and win on extraction.

notes: Designer-approved recovery spectacle route: hero puppy first, then the upper secondary rescue.
